message:
chore(gitignore): ignore .tmp/ and target_*/ ephemeral directories

- .tmp/ holds transient clipboard/copy scratch files from interactive sessions
- target_*/ covers alternate cargo build directories (e.g. target_foggy/)
  that complement the existing target-*/ glob pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
